phase: Phase 7 Display / Graphics Minimal Full Vertical
scope: Add DisplaySnapshotBarrierRecord as first-class semantic snapshot barrier evidence for display resources
Add ValidateDisplaySnapshotBarrier command and DisplaySnapshotBarrierValidated event
Reject active FramebufferWindowLease objects at snapshot barrier validation
Reject active FramebufferMapping objects at snapshot barrier validation
Reject dirty FramebufferDirtyRegion objects at snapshot barrier validation
Tie valid display snapshot barriers to exact Store, DisplayObject, FramebufferObject, and optional DisplayCleanup generations
Expose display-snapshot-barrier stable ViewV1 and graph historical edges through osctl
no_goals: real framebuffer present or scanout flush
real snapshot COW or page freezing

findings_fixed: Display snapshot barrier validation consumes exact object refs and generations instead of display/debug labels
Active framebuffer leases, mappings, and dirty regions are rejected before snapshot validation succeeds
Display cleanup remains historical evidence and does not become a live ownership edge
ContractGraph validates display snapshot barrier refs and stale cleanup refs
osctl ViewV1 reports the barrier authority requirements and zero active display boundary counts
bad_smells_checked: No real snapshot COW implementation was added under this semantic checkpoint
No raw framebuffer mapping became semantic truth
No third-party graphics dependency was introduced
osctl emits ViewV1 JSON rather than internal Rust structs
display snapshot barrier history is represented with historical graph edges
residual_notes: Future real snapshot implementation must rebuild substrate display mappings from semantic framebuffer objects

residual_gaps: Future real snapshot implementation must rebuild substrate display mappings from semantic framebuffer objects
